validator_assessment.weakest_link: Internals confidence 0.45 is the lowest of four; XLE +0.76% vs. XLK flat is narrow sector breadth — a single tech ramp in hour one flips the rotation narrative entirely. VIX interpretation also fragile: +6.84% spike from calm Friday close is historically a capitulation signature, not a multi-hour downtrend starter.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY rallies above 683.00 (slow EMA) by 09:40 ET on volume >= 1.5x 20-bar average — CLEAN_BEAR ribbon inverts, technical thesis collapses, support 677.53 goes untested.

primary.condition: if SPY holds below 683.00 (slow EMA) at open and BEAR ribbon persists

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks below 677.53 (Carry support) with volume >= 1.5x 20-bar average

invalidation.condition: SPY rallies above 683.00 (slow EMA) by 09:40 ET on volume >= 1.5x 20-bar average, OR VIX drops below 20.50 within first 30 minutes of RTH
invalidation.effect: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon structure breaks; macro fear-engine collapses. Consensus trade invalidated — 677.53 support goes untested and price reverses toward 686.26 resistance instead.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY touches or trades through 677.53 (Carry support) at least once before 11:00 ET on 2026-02-17
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not touch 678.00 (within $0.47 of battle level) before 11:00 ET — price stays in the 681–683 range, failing to follow through on BEAR ribbon

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains above 20.50 through 10:00 ET — no capitulation-level reversal in the first 30 minutes of RTH — sustaining the HIGH regime macro backdrop
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX drops below 20.50 before 09:35 ET, signaling that Friday's +6.84% spike was a premarket panic flush rather than momentum continuation

swarm_predictions.claim: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon structure remains intact through the first 60 minutes of RTH (10:30 ET) — SPY does not close a 5-min bar above the pivot EMA at 682.24
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5-min bar above 682.24 before 10:30 ET on above-average volume, inverting the ribbon structure to transitional or BULL

synthesis_narrative: All four specialist agents voted unanimously bearish on 2026-02-17: a CLEAN_BEAR ribbon with 149-cent spread, VIX rising into HIGH regime (22.03, +6.84%), risk-off sector rotation (energy leads, tech flat), and price $4.08 above the Carry support floor at 677.53 collectively point to a put-biased session targeting that battle level. The sole structural tension — flagged by the validator at moderate robustness — is whether Friday's exhaustion pattern (body degradation 84%→22%→15%) and flat overnight gap represent completed seller flush rather than continuation, leaving the door open for a VIX-capitulation relief bounce that never reaches 677.53. Watch 683.00 (slow EMA, the CLEAN_BEAR gatekeeper) at open: a 5-min close above it on volume is the single most important event that would invalidate the entire day's thesis.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (spread 149c, price 63c below pivot EMA) with Friday exhaustion pattern (body degradation 84%→22%→15%) — bear structure primary signal, VIX HIGH regime overlay

macro.one_line: VIX 22.03 rising +6.84% into HIGH regime, zero macro events today, flat overnight gap, risk-off macro backdrop — full trading day available under bearish tone

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 677.53 (Carry 2★) is primary target from $4.08 above; 681–683 zone is Reference-only with no strong intraday support between current price and Carry floor

internals.one_line: Risk-off rotation: XLE +0.76% leading while XLK 0.0% and XLF +0.19% flat — narrow breadth, tech not participating, defensive energy signal is fragile but directionally bearish

validator.top_invalidation: SPY rallies above 683.00 (slow EMA) by 09:40 ET on volume >= 1.5x 20-bar average — CLEAN_BEAR ribbon breaks, technical thesis inverts, 677.53 goes untested
